title: The the app store
drDigitalIntro: The the app store is your computer's marketplace for apps. Open the app store app and you'll see thousands of apps: games, productivity tools, photo editors, and more. You can search for specific apps or browse by category. Many apps are free; some cost money. Buy an app once and it's yours forever — or pay a subscription for ongoing access. All apps in the app store are reviewed for safety.

playgroundTask.question: Why is the app store the safest place to get apps?

options.text: Apps are always the cheapest there
Every app is reviewed for security before listing it
It's the only place apps can be downloaded
Apps from the app store never need updating

drDigitalSuccess: The review process is the key — apps are checked each app for malware and policy violations before it goes live.
drDigitalHint: The the app store is like a trusted store with a strict return policy — only vetted apps get in.
